actions.title: Enforce signed firmware with verified public keys
actions.description: Ensure each device verifies firmware signatures with a vetted public key and rejects unsigned or invalid updates.

actions.title: Disable telnet and cleartext services
actions.description: Remove telnet daemon and other cleartext network services from production firmware.

actions.title: Secure debug interfaces
actions.description: Disable JTAG and debug interfaces in production builds, or protect them with cryptographic authentication.

actions.title: Remove hardcoded credentials
actions.description: Replace hardcoded passwords and factory keys with secure key derivation or provisioning mechanisms.

actions.title: Enforce signed firmware with verified public keys
actions.description: Ensure each device verifies firmware signatures with a vetted public key and rejects unsigned or invalid updates.

actions.title: Implement secure provisioning
actions.description: Replace demo tokens with cryptographically secure, unique per-device provisioning credentials.

actions.title: Validate all firmware signatures
actions.description: Ensure bootloader validates the signature of subsequent firmware images before loading.

actions.title: Enforce signed firmware with verified public keys
actions.description: Ensure each device verifies firmware signatures with a vetted public key and rejects unsigned or invalid updates.
